questions.question: How did you handle the payments outage?
questions.answerSummary: Walked through the incident timeline but never mentioned leading the response
questions.quote: Walked through the incident timeline and on-call rotation

questions.question: How do you keep CI fast?
questions.answerSummary: Described the build-time work with concrete numbers
questions.quote: Discussed build times and flaky tests

themes.text: Reliability ran through the whole conversation
themes.quote: Walked through the incident timeline and on-call rotation

signals.text: The interviewer probed Kubernetes depth twice
signals.quote: Interviewer asked twice about Kubernetes experience

drills: Rehearse the payments outage story leading with the incident-command role
